sources.name: Open Georgia (state transparency portal)
sources.provides: State employee salaries & travel; payments, obligations, and professional-services expenditures of state organizations

sources.name: Open Georgia — payments, obligations, professional services
sources.provides: Vendor payments, obligations, and professional-services expenditures of state organizations, CSV export per fiscal year (2015+)

sources.name: Georgia Data Analytics Center — Budget
sources.provides: State of Georgia revenues and expenditures dashboards
sources.note: Display-only: the Tableau workbooks on prod.insights.georgia.gov disable data export (allow_export_data=false, verified 2026-07). State revenue/expenditure figures are parsed from the OPB Governor's Budget Report instead.

sources.name: OPB — Governor's Budget Reports listing
sources.provides: Index of Governor's Budget Report PDFs; Last-Modified changes when OPB publishes a new report (register the new PDF in sources.json and pipeline/etl_state.py OPB_REPORTS when that happens)

sources.name: OPB — Governor's Budget Report, AFY 2025 & FY 2026
sources.provides: State revenues reported/estimated by source (FY2022-FY2026) and expenditures/appropriations by agency (FY2023-FY2026), parsed from PDF tables

sources.name: US Census — county population estimates, vintage 2020 (2010-2020)
sources.provides: Annual county population estimates 2010-2020 (POPESTIMATE columns); denominator for per-capita metrics

sources.name: US Census — county population estimates, vintage 2024 (2020-2024)
sources.provides: Annual county population estimates 2020-2024 (POPESTIMATE columns); denominator for per-capita metrics

sources.name: DCA — Report of Local Government Finances
sources.provides: County and municipal revenues, expenditures, debt, and assets (required annual filing)
sources.cadence: rolling; due 6 months after each government's fiscal year end

sources.name: TED — RLGF all-counties Excel workbook
sources.provides: County revenues and expenditures by RLGF classification and fiscal year (2016+), one sheet per county; prebuilt export behind the TED portal's File Export page

sources.name: Tax & Expenditure Data Center (UGA Carl Vinson Institute)
sources.provides: Downloadable RLGF datasets and local government budget documents

sources.name: GeorgiaData.org — Local Government Financial Portal
sources.provides: Searchable county, municipal, and school-system financial data
